title: Through My Window
tmdbOverview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Through My Window is a romance, drama and comedy film from Spain. It has a 5.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
